name: PM-KISAN
description: Direct income support scheme providing ₹6,000 per year to eligible farmer families in three equal installments.
eligibility: All landholding farmer families with cultivable land.

name: PMFBY
description: Comprehensive crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas.

name: Soil Health Card
description: Provides every farmer a soil health card with crop-wise recommendations of nutrients and fertilizers for individual farms.

name: PMKSY
description: Scheme to improve farm-level water use efficiency through micro irrigation, watershed management, and new water sources.
eligibility: All farmers, priority for small and marginal farmers.

name: PKVY
description: Promotes organic farming through cluster approach and PGS certification.
eligibility: Groups of 50+ farmers willing to convert to organic farming.

name: KCC
description: Provides farmers with affordable credit for crop production, post-harvest expenses, and farm maintenance.
benefits: Credit up to ₹3 lakh at 4% interest
eligibility: All farmers including tenant farmers and sharecroppers.

name: e-NAM
description: Pan-India electronic trading portal connecting APMC mandis for unified national agricultural commodity market.
eligibility: All farmers, traders, and buyers with Aadhaar-linked bank account.

name: AIF
description: ₹1 lakh crore financing facility for agriculture infrastructure projects including cold storage and warehouses.
benefits: Support for cold chains and warehouses

name: NMSA
description: Promotes sustainable agriculture including rainfed area development and climate change adaptation.
eligibility: All farmers with focus on rainfed areas.

name: RKVY
description: Provides states flexibility to implement agriculture development programs based on local needs.

name: MIDH
fullName: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
description: Promotes holistic growth of horticulture sector including fruits, vegetables, flowers, and spices.
eligibility: All farmers and entrepreneurs in horticulture.

name: KUSUM
fullName: PM Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan
description: Promotes solar energy in agriculture through solar pumps and grid-connected solar plants.
benefits: Extra income from surplus solar power
